headline: UBER Expands Its Food Delivery Business: Is it a Growth Catalyst?
summary: UBER is expanding Uber Eats with new retailers, pushing beyond food delivery into everyday needs, from skincare and shipping to pet supplies.

headline: Q1 Earnings Outperformers: Dollar General (NYSE:DG) And The Rest Of The Non-Discretionary Retail Stocks
summary: The end of the earnings season is always a good time to take a step back and see who shined (and who didn’t). Let’s take a look at how non-discretionary retail stocks fared in Q1, starting with Dollar General (NYSE:DG).

headline: Can Target's New Assortment Lift Back-to-School Sales This Year?
summary: Target's back-to-school push blends exclusive collaborations, owned brands, deals and AI-driven shopping tools to win students, parents and teachers.
